_note_two_step: loadAndImportData with interfaceDetails=20 ONLY runs Load File to Interface Tables on this product (rows land in PJC_TXN_XFACE_STAGE_ALL at TRANSACTION_STATUS_CODE='P'); it never chains the costing import. The import is a SEPARATE submitESSJobRequest declared as a downstream_job. CRITICAL: the WORKING import job is onestop,ImportAndProcessTxnsJob (shadow proc pjc_import_and_process.import_and_process_ess, 10 positional args), NOT onestop,ImportProcessParallelEssJob (shadow proc onestop_parallel_ess, 13 args). Every ImportProcessParallelEssJob submission on this pod ERRORs with ORA-06502 in its own parameter parsing -- confirmed across ~20 historical runs in ESS request history, state 10. The 10-arg positional order was read from two SUCCEEDED ImportAndProcessTxnsJob runs (request ids 9719834, 9719348) via FUSION.ESS_REQUEST_PROPERTY (submit.argument1..10) cross-referenced to the shadow proc signature in ALL_ARGUMENTS: 1=P_MODE(IMPORT_AND_PROCESS) 2=P_BU_ID(numeric bu id) 3=P_TXN_STATUS(ALL) 4=P_BATCH_NAME(free text) 5=P_INTERFACE_ID(empty) 6=P_TXN_SOURCE_ID(numeric) 7=P_DOCUMENT_ID(numeric) 8=P_START_PROJECT_NO 9=P_END_PROJECT_NO 10=P_PROCESS_THROUGH_DATE. The old 14-arg recipe crashed because it put a non-numeric (BU name / process date) into a numeric slot. Import validates + costs: accepted rows move to PJC_EXP_ITEMS_ALL; rejected rows get 'R' in the staging table.

discovery.name: EXP_PROJECT_TASK_REF
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT pv.segment1 AS PRJNUM, tv.element_number AS TASKNUM, (SELECT expenditure_type_name FROM pjf_exp_types_tl t WHERE t.expenditure_type_id = ei.expenditure_type_id AND t.language = 'US') AS EXPTYPE, (SELECT name FROM hr_organization_units o WHERE o.organization_id = ei.expenditure_organization_id) AS EXPORG, (SELECT bu_name FROM fun_all_business_units_v b WHERE b.bu_id = ei.org_id) AS BUNAME, ei.org_id AS BUID, ei.unit_of_measure AS UOM, TO_CHAR(ei.expenditure_item_date, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS EIDATE FROM pjc_exp_items_all ei JOIN pjf_projects_all_vl pv ON pv.project_id = ei.project_id JOIN pjf_proj_elements_vl tv ON tv.proj_element_id = ei.task_id WHERE ei.system_linkage_function = 'PJ' AND ei.org_id = 300000046987012 AND ei.expenditure_type_id IS NOT NULL AND ei.expenditure_organization_id IS NOT NULL AND (SELECT expenditure_type_name FROM pjf_exp_types_tl t WHERE t.expenditure_type_id = ei.expenditure_type_id AND t.language = 'US') IN ('Meals','Airfare','Hotel','Miscellaneous') ORDER BY ei.expenditure_item_date DESC, pv.segment1, tv.element_number) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: EXP_TXN_SOURCE
discovery.sql: SELECT * FROM (SELECT s.user_transaction_source AS UTS, s.transaction_source_id AS TSID, d.document_name AS DOCNAME, b.document_id AS DOCID, e.doc_entry_name AS ENTRYNAME FROM pjf_txn_sources_vl s JOIN pjf_txn_document_b b ON b.transaction_source_id = s.transaction_source_id JOIN pjf_txn_document_vl d ON d.document_id = b.document_id JOIN pjf_txn_doc_entry_vl e ON e.document_id = b.document_id AND e.system_linkage_function = 'PJ' WHERE s.user_transaction_source = 'External Miscellaneous') WHERE ROWNUM = 1

discovery.name: EXP_SYSDATE
discovery.sql: SELECT TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY/MM/DD') AS SYSSLASH, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS SYSDASH FROM dual

base_read.sql: SELECT orig_transaction_reference AS ORIG_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE, expenditure_item_id AS EXPENDITURE_ITEM_ID, denom_raw_cost AS DENOM_RAW_COST FROM pjc_exp_items_all WHERE orig_transaction_reference LIKE :PREFIX || 'RT-EXP-%'

verify.bad_absence_note: Import and Process Cost Transactions purges rejected rows from PJC_TXN_XFACE_STAGE_ALL after the run (0 rows for this prefix; they are NOT retained at status 'R' on this pod, and PJC_TXN_XFACE_ALL / PJC_BIP_REPORT_DETAILS are not BIP-reachable). Rejection is proven by ABSENCE from base PJC_EXP_ITEMS_ALL while the two good rows from the SAME import reached base with real EXPENDITURE_ITEM_IDs. The per-row error text lives only in the Import-Costs report XML (ESS_O_<n>_BIP.xml from downloadESSJobExecutionDetails on the import request): the bad key rejects with MESSAGE_NAME=PJC_EXP_TYPE_INVALID / ERROR_GROUP=VALIDATIONS for expenditure type ZZ-BAD-EXPTYPE-99.
